task_objective: Address code review action items including unretrieved future exceptions in main.py, non-thread-safe double-checked diagnostics logging in service.py, memory/state updates on unmounted component in index.tsx, and CSS classes refactoring.
design_decisions: Added a done callback in main.py _run_blocking that calls future.exception() to consume any exception and prevent garbage collection warnings when the future is cancelled.
Wrapped the log diagnostics check and call in service.py inside a double-checked locking block with self._adapter_lock to ensure thread-safety.
Introduced a useRef variable isMounted in index.tsx to track if the React component is mounted, guarding all state setters in loadInitial and other asynchronous blocks.
Moved inline styling in index.tsx for status fields and busy labels to qamPanelStyles static CSS rules to follow standard styling patterns.
results: All tests passed successfully (238 passed), including type check (ty check) and linter/formatter (ruff).
